title: Event Planner

rationales.taskAutomation: Vendor research, budgeting, and logistics scheduling have a real digital component, but on-site execution and relationship management with vendors and clients stay human.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI budgeting and vendor-matching tools are credible and improving but not yet a mature, standard part of the event-planning toolchain.
rationales.adoption: Adoption is concentrated among early-adopter planning firms; most independent planners still run logistics manually.
rationales.agenticExposure: Vendor sourcing, budget tracking, and scheduling are agent-ownable workflows; live on-site problem-solving is not.

tasksGrowing: On-site crisis management during live events
Client relationship management and vision translation
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 13-1121, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: On-site crisis management for live events
AI budgeting and vendor-matching tool fluency
Client vision translation and stakeholder management

insight: AI can already shortlist vendors and track a budget against invoices. It cannot fix a collapsed tent an hour before guests arrive, which is still the job most clients are actually paying for.
